content.en:
The City of the Immortal God, somewhere above the attic.

Ye Tian took a glass of fine wine and tasted it, while the copying talent was shrouded, looking at everyone who entered the Immortal God City.

Especially the people of the Sword Emperor Sect, he focused on exploring.

But after some investigation, he did not find any trace of Allah of the Yan Dao.

"That's right, how could a person who is so careful with Allah of the Yan Dao show up easily, otherwise he would have been caught by the people of the Divine Blade Alliance a long time ago!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Half a day later, the auction began.

Ye Tian disguised himself as an ordinary galaxy level, and entered the auction with a treasure that could hide his aura.

As a result, others will not recognize him at all.

The auction began, and the auction was auctioned off one by one, and the competition was fierce.

The auction items that can enter this auction are all good, and even some rare things, even if they are not as good as the Origin Knife and Chaos Rare Earth, they are all treasures for the galaxy level or the galaxy level.

Time passed little by little, and a large number of auction items were auctioned off.

Finally, the three finale items are on the field.

"Next, please give out the first lot!"

The auctioneer shouted.

Immediately, a knife weapon was presented, and it was the origin knife weapon provided by Ye Tian.

"This is a top-level origin artifact, intact, suitable for a sword powerhouse above the galaxy level, with a minimum price of 1 billion divine crystals!"

The auctioneer shouted.

"1.5 billion!"

"2 billion!"

......

A galaxy-level powerhouse exported the auction, and the scene was very hot.

Soon, the Sword Feather Divine Lord also participated, and directly quoted: "4 billion Divine Crystals!"

Although the Divine Crystal is not a very precious currency, it is also an indispensable currency for the ordinary god-level, even if the overlord-level forces have not too many Divine Crystals, and 4 billion Divine Crystals are taken out at once, which is equivalent to the income of a hegemon-level force for decades.

Seeing that the Sword Feather Divine Lord was bidding for an Origin Sword Weapon, although the other forces were curious, they didn't dare to offend this new cosmic god, and gave up one by one.

If it weren't for Ye Tian talking to him, he might not suspect anything, he would only feel that the Sword Feather Divine Lord had wasted the Divine Crystal to buy a weapon that he didn't need.

But now, he has some guesses.

"Allah of the Flame Sword!"

The Undead Lord muttered inwardly.

The other side.

Ye Tian also noticed the scene of the Sword Feather God Lord bidding for the Origin Sword Weapon, and couldn't help but smile secretly: "It seems that the Sword Feather God Lord really has a connection with the Yan Dao Allah, otherwise, he would not be able to bid for the Origin Sword Weapon." However, the Sword Feather God Lord will definitely be very careful to send the Origin Sword Weapon to Yandao Allah in a special way, and it is impossible to meet Yandao Allah in person, so it is still a little difficult to see Yandao Allah through the Sword Feather God Lord!"

The Origin Knife was auctioned off by the Sword Feather Divine Lord for 4 billion Divine Crystals, and then the second finale item was auctioned.

This auction item is a treasure provided by the Immortal Legion, and it is a Heavenly Dao Script, but it is only a Fire Heavenly Dao Script.

In the end, this Fire Heavenly Dao text was auctioned by a top galaxy-level powerhouse.

"Next is the last auction item-Chaos Rare Earth, maybe many people don't know the role of Chaos Rare Earth, it is useless to martial artists below the Universe God, only to the Universe God. Chaos Rare Earth can stabilize the small universe in the body of the new cosmic god, and it can expand the small universe of the cosmic god, saving countless years of penance. Chaos rare earth has a total of 100 catties, and the auction is now open, with a starting price of 10 billion divine crystals, and the treasure can be mortgaged to bid. The auctioneer shouted.

"Sure enough, there are Chaos Rare Earths!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord was excited.

Even the cosmic gods of several other hegemon-level forces were moved.

They are not new cosmic gods, and the small universe in their bodies is already stable, but who doesn't want to be more stable, who doesn't want to increase the strength of the small universe faster?

"20 billion!"

"30 billion!"

"40 billion!"

The bidders were all the four cosmic gods of the other four overlord-level forces, among which the Sword Feather Divine Lord was the most crazy, and it seemed that he would do whatever it took for the Chaos Rare Earth.

Soon, the auction price reached 100 billion!

The value of 100 billion Divine Crystals, such a huge number is so amazing that even the four major hegemon-level forces feel the pressure.

Even if the auction is in hand, it will be a significant price for the hegemon-level forces, and it will take a long time to recover.

"150 billion divine crystals!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord quoted a staggering price.

The Sect Master of the Ancient Sect, the Valley Master of the Desperate Valley, and the Hall Master of the Divine Desolate Hall shook their heads one by one and gave up.

Obviously, the price of 150 billion divine crystals is too high, and they don't have to be chaotic rare earths, so it's a big deal to cultivate slowly.

The disk is relatively peaceful, and the competition is not big, so there is no need to be so crazy.

Moreover, they also knew very well that not long after the Sword Feather Divine Lord broke through to the Universe God, his strength was relatively weak in the Universe God Realm, and the small universe in his body was not stable, so he undoubtedly needed Chaos Rare Earth even more.

Therefore, it is not easy for them to fight to the death with the Sword Feather God Lord!

When the auctioneer's hammer fell, the Sword Feather Divine Lord breathed a sigh of relief.

"It's finally filmed!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord muttered.

After the auction ended, the Sword Feather Divine Lord handed over the money for the auction item and took the Origin Knife Weapon and the Chaos Rare Earth.

When the Sword Feather Divine Lord left with the people of the Sword Emperor Sect, Ye Tian returned to his original state and met with the Undead Army Master.

"Wanfa True Monarch, the Sword Feather God Lord bid for the Origin Knife, it seems that it is really related to Yandao Allah, and it is estimated that it is auctioned for Yandao Allah. What are you going to do now, with the caution of the Sword Feather God Lord and the Yan Dao Allah, it is estimated that it will not be easy to track down!" said the Undead Army Lord.

"Yes, the Sword Feather God Lord will definitely not meet with Yan Dao Allah, and Yan Dao Allah does not dare to return to the Sword Emperor Sect, so the Sword Feather God Lord must entrust someone to bring the Chaos Rare Earth to Yan Dao Allah, and even the intermediary does not necessarily know the existence of Yan Dao Allah. But there is one thing that the Sword Feather Divine Lord may ignore, and that is - I am the envoy of the town domain!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Emissary of the Town!"

The undead lord suddenly realized.

"I almost forgot, the True Monarch of Ten Thousand Laws is the envoy of the town domain, and the token of the town envoy is rumored to be created by the supremes, and it can control the power of one side of the star field and monitor the four directions. With the cultivation of the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch, it is enough to monitor the traces of many people, as long as the Sword Feather God Lord dares to send someone to do this, the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch can monitor the location of the Yan Dao Allah!"

"However, I need to use the undead military lord to activate the town envoy order, and I also hope that the undead army lord can help me cover up the vision used by the town envoy order, so as not to be perceived by several other cosmic gods!" Ye Tian pleaded.

"It's just a trivial matter, don't worry!"

The undead warlord said with a smile.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the order of the town envoy at the headquarters of the undead legion.

Then, Ye Tian urged the envoy of the town to order.

Bang!!!!

The power of the star field and the luck of the human race converged here, and a huge figure appeared in the void.

And at this time, the undead army lord covered this place with majestic power, so that outsiders would not suspect the town envoy just because the undead army master was cultivating some kind of secret art.

In an instant, Ye Tian's gaze passed through the layers of space and looked at the headquarters of the Sword Emperor Sect.

Sword Emperor Sect.

After the Sword Feather God Lord returned, he carefully probed the surroundings, and even opened the large array, and then contacted Allah of the Yan Dao.

"Brother, I successfully bid for the Origin Knife and 100 catties of Chaos Rare Earth, I left 50 catties of Chaos Rare Earth, and the rest will be given to you, when will it be sent to you?"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord asked.

It didn't take long for Allah to respond: "Send it in a few days, remember, you can't come in person, you can't let the person who delivers it know what the goods are, you can't even know my existence, it's better to find a victim, understand?"

"I'll do things, don't worry!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord assured.
